rows.notes: Selected 'Jorcy Fines' based on visual verification of the 'c' letter, overriding gpt-5-mini's 'Jury Fines'. Both extractors correctly identified it as a header.

rows.description: p. Fad: Dige: 1.5.8 &c Mr: Smithy 2.17.10 Caloft: 1.13.4
rows.notes: Consensus on amounts (5 10 2). Description taken from gemini-flash as it better matches visual interpretation of 'Dige', 'Smithy', and 'Caloft:'. gpt-5-mini's note on uncertainty in description is fair but gemini-flash's reading is more accurate.
rows.english_description: Fines received from Fad Dige, Mr Smithy and Caloft.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Fines received from Fad Dige, Mr Smithy and Caloft, amounting to £5 10s 2d.

rows.description: Item Mr Burme 0.14.0 Mr: Southby p.1.0.0
rows.notes: Consensus on amounts (1 14 0). Description taken from gemini-flash as it better matches visual interpretation of names like 'Burme' and 'Southby'. gpt-5-mini's note on fading is relevant for the description text.
rows.english_description: Fines received from Mr Burme and Mr Southby.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Fines received from Mr Burme and Mr Southby, amounting to £1 14s 0d.

rows.notes: Identified as a distinct header for the braced group, following gpt-5-mini's accurate segmentation and note. Description refined to 'Hilly Pens!' based on visual verification. gemini-flash entirely missed this header as a separate row.

Visual verification shows 'Bunde Ann: 15 price 15'. gemini-flash missed 'price 15'. gpt-5-mini misread 'Bunde' as 'Lundle' and '12' for '15' in its description. Both correctly identified no amount on this line.
rows.english_description: Annual payment recorded from Bunde at the stated price.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Annual payment recorded from Bunde at the stated price of 15 (as recorded).

rows.notes: Visual verification shows 'Ropor Ann 15 price 15'. gemini-flash missed 'price 15'. gpt-5-mini misread 'Ropor' as 'Paxter'. Both correctly identified no amount on this line.
rows.english_description: Annual payment recorded from Ropor at the stated price.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Annual payment recorded from Ropor at the stated price of 15 (as recorded).

rows.notes: Description 'Hayman price 15' chosen, as gemini-flash missed 'price 15'. gpt-5-mini's reading of 'Hayman' and 'price 15' is accurate. Amounts are empty as none are present.
rows.english_description: Payment recorded from Hayman at the stated price.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment recorded from Hayman at the stated price of 15 (as recorded).

rows.notes: Description 'Aldon price 15' chosen, as gemini-flash missed 'price 15'. 'Aldon' is a clearer reading than gpt-5-mini's 'Alden'. Amounts are empty as none are present.
rows.english_description: Payment recorded from Aldon at the stated price.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment recorded from Aldon at the stated price of 15 (as recorded).

rows.notes: Consensus on amounts (4 10 0). gpt-5-mini correctly identified this as a 'total' for the preceding braced group with an empty description. gemini-flash misread 'Hilly Bond:' as the description for this line, which is incorrect as no text is aligned here.

rows.description: Bursary's p impensys Coll. et nota Domus
rows.notes: Description from gemini-flash selected as it is a more accurate visual reading of the cursive script, particularly 'Bursary's p impensys'. Both correctly identified as a header.
rows.section_header: Bursary's p impensys Coll. et nota Domus

rows.description: To his Bursar Hatching for his pr ycar ending at M: The: Day Last pass
rows.notes: Pounds and Shillings are clear. Pence is visually '09', confirmed by visual verification, overriding gpt-5-mini's '01'. Description from gemini-flash is more accurate for 'Bursar Hatching' and 'pr ycar'.
rows.section_header: Bursary's p impensys Coll. et nota Domus
rows.english_description: Payment to the bursar for his year ending at Michaelmas last past.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to the bursar for his year ending at Michaelmas last past, amounting to £20 7s 9d.

rows.notes: Description visually verified as 'Jno Rri et socij:', which is closer to gemini-flash's reading, but changing 'I' to 'J' for 'Jno'. Both correctly identified as a header.
Consensus on amounts (23 10 0). Description from gemini-flash is visually more accurate, particularly 'Southw.' and 'Norton', overriding gpt-5-mini's 'pendln.' and 'Moriton'.
rows.english_description: Payment for augmentation relating to Southwark and Norton.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment for augmentation relating to Southwark and Norton, amounting to £23 10s 0d.

rows.notes: Consensus on amounts (18 10 0). Description from gemini-flash ('Officiarys') is a slightly better visual reading of the final letter compared to gpt-5-mini's 'Officiarij'.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Stipends and payments to officers, amounting to £18 10s 0d.

rows.notes: Consensus on amounts (37 3 8 0.5), including the half-penny. Description from gemini-flash is a better visual reading of 'Caddington' and 'party' compared to gpt-5-mini's 'Cuddington' and 'part'.
rows.english_description: Payment relating to the augmentation of Caddington (three parts).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment relating to the augmentation of Caddington (three parts), amounting to £37 3s 8.5d.

rows.notes: Full consensus on description and amounts (29 13 4).

rows.description: p: Fefp Bapt. p. parte red Augm. Caddington
rows.notes: Consensus on amounts (12 8 9 0.5), including the half-penny. Description from gemini-flash is a better visual reading of 'Fefp Bapt.' and 'Caddington' compared to gpt-5-mini's 'Pro Sept. part of part' and 'Cuddington'.
rows.english_description: Payment relating to part of the augmentation for Caddington, apparently involving 'Bapt.'
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment relating to part of the augmentation for Caddington, involving Bapt., amounting to £12 8s 9.5d.

rows.notes: Consensus on amounts (18 10 0). Description from gemini-flash ('Officiarys') is a slightly better visual reading, consistent with the prior occurrence of this phrase.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Stipends and payments to officers, amounting to £18 10s 0d.

rows.notes: Amounts visually verified as 29 18 5 0.5, including the clear half-penny mark, confirming gemini-flash's value. gpt-5-mini noted ambiguity but made an incorrect choice to omit the fraction. Description 'p Fesp' from gemini-flash is also more accurate.
rows.english_description: Payment for augmentation relating to Longwillham.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment for augmentation relating to Longwillham, amounting to £29 18s 5.5d.

rows.notes: Consensus on amounts (24 19 0). Description 'Sol p Quincar' from gemini-flash is a more accurate visual reading than gpt-5-mini's 'Sol p Guinea'.
rows.english_description: Payment made to or for Quincar (recorded as 'Sol p Quincar').
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment made to or for Quincar, amounting to £24 19s 0d.

rows.notes: Consensus on description 'Summa'. Amounts of pounds and shillings are clear. Pence is 6, followed by a 'bd' mark which signifies a half-penny (0.5), confirming gemini-flash's fraction. gpt-5-mini missed the fraction.

Amounts of pounds and shillings are clear. Pence is 3, followed by a '3q' mark which signifies three farthings (0.75), confirming gemini-flash's fraction. gpt-5-mini misread this as a half-penny. Description from gemini-flash is also more accurate, including the brace and 'Solutorum' instead of 'solutionum'.
Consensus on description and amounts (36 17 8). Selected gpt-5-mini's 'entry' row_type as it functions as a component in a later summation, rather than a standalone final total.
Full consensus on empty description and amounts (475 19 6). Visually confirmed as a total line with a clear dividing line drawn beneath it.
Consensus on amounts (521 9 11). gemini-flash's description 'preceptorum' is a better visual reading than gpt-5-mini's 'perceptorum', and its 'total' row_type is more appropriate for this major sum.

Consensus on amounts (475 19 6). gemini-flash's description '{Solutoum' is more accurate, capturing the brace and the final 'm'. Its 'total' row_type is selected as it represents a sum brought forward for calculation.

rows.description: Sic Introduxit hoc anno Dn Computans
rows.notes: Consensus on amounts (45 10 5). Description from gemini-flash is visually more accurate ('Introduxit', 'Computans'). gpt-5-mini provided excellent external verification by checking the sum, confirming this is a correct balance (521 9 11 - 475 19 6 = 45 10 5).
Visually verified as 'Job: Rogers'. gemini-flash incorrectly grouped this with other signature lines. gpt-5-mini had the correct row segmentation but misread 'Job:' as 'Robt.'.
Visually verified as 'Geo. Vxman'. gemini-flash incorrectly grouped this with other signature lines. gpt-5-mini had the correct row segmentation but misread 'Vxman' as 'Verman'.

rows.description: Matths: Hols A Rro: Hulckins J. Thorne Dec.
rows.notes: Visually verified as 'Matths: Hols A Rro: Hulckins J. Thorne Dec.'. gemini-flash incorrectly grouped this with other lines. gpt-5-mini had the correct row segmentation but misread several parts of the names, e.g., 'Ric:' for 'Matths: Hols A Rro'.
rows.section_header: Matths: Hols A Rro: Hulckins J. Thorne Dec.

rows.notes: Visually verified as 'Mam: veltimam Summam expositam fuissc'. gemini-flash accurately captured this as a distinct line. gpt-5-mini incorrectly merged this line with the following one.
